name: Peanut Butter Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and corn syrup in a saucepan.
2. Cook the mixture over medium heat until it reaches a rolling boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter and vanilla until smooth.
4. Pour the melted mixture evenly over the popped corn.
5. Toss gently to coat all pieces with the peanut butter mixture.
